Uh What, what apartment IQ is is we're, we're going to be a data source that allows you to see exactly who has what at what given time, what's moved off market, what's moved on to market and what price changes have occurred across the different floor plans from your competition.
So the, there's a couple of things I want to say about, uh, apartment IQ like number one is where the information actually comes from.
It comes directly from your competitors website.
So what we're actually looking at, it's going to be the places that you, uh that renters go in order to apply for uh for units.
So we know exactly, hey, this is what they're advertising to a renter when they come to their web page, when they get them into their experience, this is what they're trying to sell them on.

Um the information itself since we're getting it from publicly available sources is scraped on a daily basis, which means that this information is going to be changing every single day based upon how often the market changes.
So if you're in a market that has a lot of, in a lot of information, a lot of comps in it, you're gonna see some pretty big changes.
If you're in a small market, you're probably not going to see that many changes on a day to day basis.
But we have some tools to make sure that you're constantly kept abreast of what's going on in your market.
Um So the other thing I want to point out is all the information that we're gonna be looking at today is completely customizable, which means that you actually have the ability to add or.
